plan.title: Block lab: staff playground and MCP App Studio shell

kickoff.goal: Ship a safe iteration surface for WIP blocks: staff-only Next lab route (optional) + MCP App Studio package for interactive host previews and tool-driven block switching.

task.title: Scaffold MCP App Studio package
task.detail: From `vendor/grime-time-site/tools/`, run `npx mcp-app-studio grime-block-lab`, complete interactive prompts, commit generated app. Document `npm` scripts for dev and export. Link README to https://www.assistant-ui.com/mcp-app-studio .

task.title: Block registry + fixture contract
task.detail: Define a typed map of `blockType` → default props JSON (fixtures). Add one pilot block renderer in the lab that uses fixtures only (no Payload fetch). Plan migration path for `@/` imports (thin preview vs extract shared UI).

task.title: MCP tools for preview control
task.detail: Expose tools: list blocks, set active block, apply fixture variant / custom JSON. Verify in MCP App Studio mock panel and document expected host capability matrix.

task.title: Staff-only Next route (optional complement)
task.detail: Add membership-gated route that lists the same registry and renders selected block with fixtures; `noindex`, omit from sitemap and public nav.
